title: Battle of Hastings
description: William the Conqueror defeats King Harold Godwinson, marking the beginning of the Norman Conquest of England.

title: Sealing of Magna Carta
description: King John of England agrees to the Magna Carta at Runnymede.

title: Fall of Constantinople
description: Capture of the capital of the Byzantine Empire by the Ottoman Empire.

title: Luther's 95 Theses
description: Martin Luther posts his Ninety-five Theses on the door of All Saints' Church in Wittenberg.

title: Introduction of Gregorian Calendar
description: First day of the Gregorian calendar in Catholic countries (skipping Oct 5-14).
